inputs.label: Barbell Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the barbell shaft for section modulus calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the barbell shaft for section modulus calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesit modülü hesaplaması için halter milinin çapı.

inputs.label: Barbell Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the barbell between supports for bending moment calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the barbell between supports for bending moment calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eğilme momenti hesaplaması için destekler arasındaki halter uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Load Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the plates loaded on the barbell, including bar weight if not centered.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the plates loaded on the barbell, including bar weight if not centered.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Halter üzerine yüklenen plakaların ağırlığı, merkezde değilse halter ağırlığı dahil.

inputs.label: Material Yield Strength
inputs.businessContext: Yield strength of the barbell material for allowable stress calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Yield strength of the barbell material for allowable stress calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzin verilen gerilme hesaplaması için halter malzemesinin akma dayanımı.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor to ensure safe load capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design safety factor to ensure safe load capacity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güvenli yük kapasitesini sağlamak için tasarım güvenlik faktörü.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
